title: Implement an infrastructure repository
scenario: Infrastructure implements application ports. The application trait stays the dependency boundary.
instructions: Implement InMemoryUserRepository for the UserRepository port.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps register-inmemory-repo explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
